channel.title: 2. Proposal :: Internship Report - Phan Thi Khanh Bang
channel.description: Task Management System A Serverless AWS Architecture for Secure Task Collaboration 1. Executive Summary The Task Management System is designed as a secure, scalable, and low-operations web application for creating, assigning, tracking, and updating work items in real time. The system uses a serverless AWS architecture so the project can focus on application features instead of server provisioning, patching, and capacity planning.
